evals.prompt: Replace my react-native-vision-camera multi-barcode scanner with Scandit MatrixScan Batch. The screen currently uses useCodeScanner with codeTypes ['ean-13','code-128','qr'] to track every code in the frame and dedupes them by value into a running count. I want the same behavior on Scandit: track all visible barcodes, dedupe, and show the count. Here is my screen: VisionCameraScanScreen.tsx.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes the react-native-vision-camera pieces (the Camera/useCameraDevice/useCodeScanner imports, the useCodeScanner hook with codeTypes/onCodeScanned, and the codeScanner prop on Camera) and replaces them with MatrixScan Batch: DataCaptureContext.initialize once with the license placeholder, BarcodeBatchSettings with enableSymbologies mapping each VisionCamera codeType to a Symbology (ean-13 -> Symbology.EAN13UPCA, code-128 -> Symbology.Code128, qr -> Symbology.QR), new BarcodeBatch(settings), dataCaptureContext.setMode, a camera via BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings + Camera.withSettings + setFrameSource + switchToDesiredState(FrameSourceState.On), a BarcodeBatchListener whose didUpdateSession iterates session.addedTrackedBarcodes and dedupes by trackedBarcode.identifier, a BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay added to a rendered DataCaptureView, and cleanup via removeMode. The dedupe-and-count behavior and the unique-count display are preserved. A setup checklist (packages, npx pod-install, NSCameraUsageDescription, license key) is shown.

assertions.text: The react-native-vision-camera import is removed from the code
The useCodeScanner hook is removed from the code
The codeScanner prop on a Camera component is removed from the code
DataCaptureContext.initialize( is called once with the license key placeholder
'-- ENTER YOUR SCANDIT LICENSE KEY HERE --' is present
new BarcodeBatchSettings() is constructed
settings.enableSymbologies( is called
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from the 'ean-13' codeType)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from the 'code-128' codeType)
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from the 'qr' codeType)
new BarcodeBatch(settings) is constructed
dataCaptureContext.setMode( is called with the BarcodeBatch instance
BarcodeBatch.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is used for the camera settings
Camera.withSettings( is used and camera.switchToDesiredState(FrameSourceState.On) is called
didUpdateSession is implemented on a BarcodeBatchListener added with barcodeBatch.addListener(
session.addedTrackedBarcodes is iterated to accumulate newly tracked barcodes (semantic)
Dedupe uses trackedBarcode.identifier (the stable track id) rather than re-counting on every frame (semantic)
new BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay( is constructed and added via view.addOverlay( on a rendered <DataCaptureView
The unique-count display behavior from the original screen is preserved (semantic)
dataCaptureContext.removeMode( is called in the useEffect cleanup
Setup checklist mentions scandit-react-native-datacapture-core and scandit-react-native-datacapture-barcode
Setup checklist mentions npx pod-install for iOS
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription in the iOS Info.plist
